c.d: The number of active users on the platform, indicating the market reach and potential buyer base.
c.s: App Annie, Sensor Tower, SimilarWeb, Priori Data

c.d: The simplicity and intuitiveness of the app's interface and listing process.
c.s: App Store reviews, Google Play reviews, Expert reviews from tech blogs

c.d: The cost associated with listing items, including insertion fees, final value fees, and other related costs.
c.s: Official app websites, Blog comparisons, User reviews

c.d: The policies and measures in place to protect sellers from fraud and ensure secure transactions.
c.s: Official app websites, Trustpilot reviews, BBB ratings

c.d: The variety and quality of features available for creating and managing listings, such as photo editing, pricing tools, and promotional options.
c.s: App Store descriptions, Google Play descriptions, Expert reviews

c.d: The ability to reach local buyers and facilitate local pickup or delivery.
c.s: Official app websites, User reviews, Blog articles

c.d: The ease with which listings can be shared on social media platforms to increase visibility.
c.s: Official app websites, App Store descriptions, Google Play descriptions

c.d: The availability and responsiveness of customer support for resolving seller issues.
c.s: Trustpilot reviews, BBB ratings, User reviews
